records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm okay...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm okay...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm okay...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wounds like these... are nothing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wounds like these... are nothing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wounds like these... are nothing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As if. You're trembling like crazy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As if. You're trembling like crazy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As if. You're trembling like crazy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Hollow God has been chasing Solovey as soon as she set foot in the inner yard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Hollow God has been chasing Solovey as soon as she set foot in the inner yard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Hollow God has been chasing Solovey as soon as she set foot in the inner yard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to do something or Solovey will be caught before we get to our destination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to do something or Solovey will be caught before we get to our destination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to do something or Solovey will be caught before we get to our destination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we can't get away from it... we'll have to use other means.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we can't get away from it... we'll have to use other means.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we can't get away from it... we'll have to use other means.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey! Aim for its legs with your vines!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey! Aim for its legs with your vines!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey! Aim for its legs with your vines!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And while it's immobile, run toward where the treasure is with all your might!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And while it's immobile, run toward where the treasure is with all your might!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And while it's immobile, run toward where the treasure is with all your might!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...! I'll try!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...! I'll try!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...! I'll try!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know...

records.m_Talk_ENG: that I'm not as strong as Mother...
records.m_Talk_DEU: that I'm not as strong as Mother...
records.m_Talk_FRA: that I'm not as strong as Mother...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have to do this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have to do this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have to do this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I stop it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I stop it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I stop it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get back! It's getting free!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get back! It's getting free!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get back! It's getting free!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I use too much of my strength? I can't move my legs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I use too much of my strength? I can't move my legs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I use too much of my strength? I can't move my legs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get away...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get away...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get away...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess... it didn't work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess... it didn't work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess... it didn't work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tried to be courageous... but I couldn't stop trembling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tried to be courageous... but I couldn't stop trembling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tried to be courageous... but I couldn't stop trembling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is where... it all ends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is where... it all ends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is where... it all ends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle* Hnnggh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle* Hnnggh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle* Hnnggh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My star...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My star...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My star...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were sleeping so soundly just a moment ago, but why are you suddenly crying?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were sleeping so soundly just a moment ago, but why are you suddenly crying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were sleeping so soundly just a moment ago, but why are you suddenly crying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had a scary dream...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had a scary dream...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had a scary dream...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In it, Mother abandoned me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In it, Mother abandoned me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In it, Mother abandoned me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. I am right next to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. I am right next to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. I am right next to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was just a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was just a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was just a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shall we make flower rings?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we make flower rings?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we make flower rings?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Flower rings?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Flower rings?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Flower rings?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you tie a pretty flower into a circle and put it on your finger...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you tie a pretty flower into a circle and put it on your finger...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you tie a pretty flower into a circle and put it on your finger...

records.m_Talk_ENG: the flower's scent will chase away those scary thoughts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the flower's scent will chase away those scary thoughts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the flower's scent will chase away those scary thoughts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See? All better now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See? All better now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See? All better now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I'm a little better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I'm a little better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I'm a little better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most of all, I'm better now because I'm in your arms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most of all, I'm better now because I'm in your arms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most of all, I'm better now because I'm in your arms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I wonder who raised you to be so considerate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I wonder who raised you to be so considerate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I wonder who raised you to be so considerate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The day will come when I won't be there to comfort you after you wake up from a nightmare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The day will come when I won't be there to comfort you after you wake up from a nightmare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The day will come when I won't be there to comfort you after you wake up from a nightmare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't you worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't you worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't you worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as you remember that we were together... you'll never be alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as you remember that we were together... you'll never be alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as you remember that we were together... you'll never be alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll do just fine without me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll do just fine without me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll do just fine without me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be with you. You're the only person I care about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be with you. You're the only person I care about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be with you. You're the only person I care about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I wake up and see that you're not next to me, I'd rather choose to not wake up at all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I wake up and see that you're not next to me, I'd rather choose to not wake up at all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I wake up and see that you're not next to me, I'd rather choose to not wake up at all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: because you're precious to me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: because you're precious to me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: because you're precious to me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't want to disappoint you, Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't want to disappoint you, Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't want to disappoint you, Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Parents are never disappointed with their children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Parents are never disappointed with their children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Parents are never disappointed with their children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you didn't give up and gave it your all, that's good enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you didn't give up and gave it your all, that's good enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you didn't give up and gave it your all, that's good enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, it's your decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, it's your decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, it's your decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you be content... with stopping here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you be content... with stopping here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you be content... with stopping here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Solovey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Solovey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Solovey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you get up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you get up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you get up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Parry...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Parry...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Parry...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?! Blood...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?! Blood...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?! Blood...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It just... hurts like crazy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It just... hurts like crazy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It just... hurts like crazy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you get hurt... trying to protect me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you get hurt... trying to protect me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you get hurt... trying to protect me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to die... because of me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to die... because of me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to die... because of me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going to die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going to die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going to die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Liar... Your wound looks severe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Liar... Your wound looks severe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Liar... Your wound looks severe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're just a child, but... I gave you a task too big for you to handle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're just a child, but... I gave you a task too big for you to handle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're just a child, but... I gave you a task too big for you to handle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still... you've done a great job so far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still... you've done a great job so far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still... you've done a great job so far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough so that... it would be a shame to stop here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough so that... it would be a shame to stop here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough so that... it would be a shame to stop here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's shameless of me to ask this of you as an adult, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's shameless of me to ask this of you as an adult, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's shameless of me to ask this of you as an adult, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the rest to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the rest to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the rest to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My energy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My energy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My energy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...it's coming back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...it's coming back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...it's coming back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That must be it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That must be it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That must be it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This power... you're giving me your energy, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This power... you're giving me your energy, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This power... you're giving me your energy, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I contained it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I contained it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I contained it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I succeeded... in using Mother's isolation ability...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I succeeded... in using Mother's isolation ability...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I succeeded... in using Mother's isolation ability...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure... how long it will last because it's my first time, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure... how long it will last because it's my first time, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure... how long it will last because it's my first time, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be able to reach the center of the garden now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be able to reach the center of the garden now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be able to reach the center of the garden now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll bring back the treasure... no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll bring back the treasure... no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll bring back the treasure... no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, he dodged it again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, he dodged it again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, he dodged it again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if they know... when I'm going to pull the trigger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if they know... when I'm going to pull the trigger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if they know... when I'm going to pull the trigger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike Shadows that attack relentlessly... their movements are agile and tactical.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike Shadows that attack relentlessly... their movements are agile and tactical.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike Shadows that attack relentlessly... their movements are agile and tactical.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I try attacking one, he retreats while the other one attacks, leaving no room for me to attack or defend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I try attacking one, he retreats while the other one attacks, leaving no room for me to attack or defend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I try attacking one, he retreats while the other one attacks, leaving no room for me to attack or defend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima. The fight won't end at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima. The fight won't end at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima. The fight won't end at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about we focus on one of them together?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about we focus on one of them together?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about we focus on one of them together?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure it can't escape, so aim for his weak point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure it can't escape, so aim for his weak point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure it can't escape, so aim for his weak point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: NOW!
records.m_Talk_DEU: NOW!
records.m_Talk_FRA: NOW!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bulls eye!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bulls eye!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bulls eye!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did the other one go?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did the other one go?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did the other one go?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's after the Administrator!
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's after the Administrator!
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's after the Administrator!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?! NO!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?! NO!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?! NO!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, this is checkmate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, this is checkmate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, this is checkmate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadow... suddenly stopped?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadow... suddenly stopped?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadow... suddenly stopped?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? What is that doll the Administrator is holding...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? What is that doll the Administrator is holding...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? What is that doll the Administrator is holding...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you ignore the combatants and try to attack the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you ignore the combatants and try to attack the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you ignore the combatants and try to attack the Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone who is called the hero of the Northern Union, you seem to use dirty tricks without hesitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone who is called the hero of the Northern Union, you seem to use dirty tricks without hesitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone who is called the hero of the Northern Union, you seem to use dirty tricks without hesitation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Demogorgon. An unknown Shadow that fought as an ally in the Qliphoth Game...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Demogorgon. An unknown Shadow that fought as an ally in the Qliphoth Game...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Demogorgon. An unknown Shadow that fought as an ally in the Qliphoth Game...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering what that teddy bear-shaped Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator was for. So, it was to lure that monster here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering what that teddy bear-shaped Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator was for. So, it was to lure that monster here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering what that teddy bear-shaped Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator was for. So, it was to lure that monster here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a hawk, not a bear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a hawk, not a bear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a hawk, not a bear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... a hawk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... a hawk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... a hawk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take care of her, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take care of her, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take care of her, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. There's no need for you to step in. Protecting me is enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. There's no need for you to step in. Protecting me is enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. There's no need for you to step in. Protecting me is enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since we have invaded their territory, we should not instigate a slaughter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since we have invaded their territory, we should not instigate a slaughter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since we have invaded their territory, we should not instigate a slaughter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I will focus on guarding you, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I will focus on guarding you, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I will focus on guarding you, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for understanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're rather tame. I wanted to see the Administration's Demogorgon go on a rampage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're rather tame. I wanted to see the Administration's Demogorgon go on a rampage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're rather tame. I wanted to see the Administration's Demogorgon go on a rampage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll get even more interesting if you snap my neck like you did to Nehemoth's Apostle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll get even more interesting if you snap my neck like you did to Nehemoth's Apostle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll get even more interesting if you snap my neck like you did to Nehemoth's Apostle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Felix. I don't believe that spilling blood is necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Felix. I don't believe that spilling blood is necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Felix. I don't believe that spilling blood is necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you give us your word that you won't disturb us, we'll leave as soon as we retrieve what we came here for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you give us your word that you won't disturb us, we'll leave as soon as we retrieve what we came here for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you give us your word that you won't disturb us, we'll leave as soon as we retrieve what we came here for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. How about you stop trying to persuade me with such naive methods?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. How about you stop trying to persuade me with such naive methods?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. How about you stop trying to persuade me with such naive methods?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because there is nothing the Administration owns within the lands of the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because there is nothing the Administration owns within the lands of the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because there is nothing the Administration owns within the lands of the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we hand over two of the Administration's Artifacts?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we hand over two of the Administration's Artifacts?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we hand over two of the Administration's Artifacts?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator?! Why would you say that...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator?! Why would you say that...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator?! Why would you say that...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how precious an Artifact is, it's not worth as much as a person's life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how precious an Artifact is, it's not worth as much as a person's life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how precious an Artifact is, it's not worth as much as a person's life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want any casualties to be made here. If you step aside for now, I will hand them over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want any casualties to be made here. If you step aside for now, I will hand them over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want any casualties to be made here. If you step aside for now, I will hand them over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like my offer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like my offer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like my offer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Not worth as much as a person's life..." That's interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Not worth as much as a person's life..." That's interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Not worth as much as a person's life..." That's interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, how about I make a counterproposal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, how about I make a counterproposal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, how about I make a counterproposal?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I won
8kt touch the Artifacts or the intruders.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I won
8kt touch the Artifacts or the intruders.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I won
8kt touch the Artifacts or the intruders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, under one condition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, under one condition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, under one condition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give me the right to kill or spare the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give me the right to kill or spare the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give me the right to kill or spare the Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll decline that offer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll decline that offer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll decline that offer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aside from whether we trust you or not, I'm not handing over the most important person for my safety.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aside from whether we trust you or not, I'm not handing over the most important person for my safety.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aside from whether we trust you or not, I'm not handing over the most important person for my safety.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Same here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Same here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Same here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will follow any orders from the Administrator, but nothing that will put his life at stake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will follow any orders from the Administrator, but nothing that will put his life at stake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will follow any orders from the Administrator, but nothing that will put his life at stake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Subordinates who answer for their superior as they please. Guess I won't be getting the answer I was expecting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Subordinates who answer for their superior as they please. Guess I won't be getting the answer I was expecting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Subordinates who answer for their superior as they please. Guess I won't be getting the answer I was expecting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deal's off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deal's off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deal's off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The number of Shadows... has increased.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The number of Shadows... has increased.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The number of Shadows... has increased.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It can only mean that they were holding back their power from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It can only mean that they were holding back their power from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It can only mean that they were holding back their power from the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just... how many more weapons are they hiding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just... how many more weapons are they hiding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just... how many more weapons are they hiding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: One thing we are certain about is that we have also gained a trustworthy ally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One thing we are certain about is that we have also gained a trustworthy ally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One thing we are certain about is that we have also gained a trustworthy ally.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she is protecting the Administrator, then I will be able to focus on fighting this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she is protecting the Administrator, then I will be able to focus on fighting this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she is protecting the Administrator, then I will be able to focus on fighting this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All units to positions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All units to positions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All units to positions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tighten the encirclement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tighten the encirclement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tighten the encirclement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's time to rein in the Administration's dogs running loose on our lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's time to rein in the Administration's dogs running loose on our lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's time to rein in the Administration's dogs running loose on our lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm okay...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm okay...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm okay...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wounds like these... are nothing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wounds like these... are nothing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wounds like these... are nothing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: As if. You're trembling like crazy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As if. You're trembling like crazy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As if. You're trembling like crazy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Hollow God has been chasing Solovey as soon as she set foot in the inner yard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Hollow God has been chasing Solovey as soon as she set foot in the inner yard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Hollow God has been chasing Solovey as soon as she set foot in the inner yard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to do something or Solovey will be caught before we get to our destination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to do something or Solovey will be caught before we get to our destination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to do something or Solovey will be caught before we get to our destination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we can't get away from it... we'll have to use other means.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we can't get away from it... we'll have to use other means.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we can't get away from it... we'll have to use other means.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey! Aim for its legs with your vines!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey! Aim for its legs with your vines!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey! Aim for its legs with your vines!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And while it's immobile, run toward where the treasure is with all your might!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And while it's immobile, run toward where the treasure is with all your might!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And while it's immobile, run toward where the treasure is with all your might!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...! I'll try!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...! I'll try!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...! I'll try!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know...

root.m_Talk_ENG: that I'm not as strong as Mother...
root.m_Talk_DEU: that I'm not as strong as Mother...
root.m_Talk_FRA: that I'm not as strong as Mother...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have to do this...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have to do this...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have to do this...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I stop it...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I stop it...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I stop it...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get back! It's getting free!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get back! It's getting free!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get back! It's getting free!

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I use too much of my strength? I can't move my legs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I use too much of my strength? I can't move my legs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I use too much of my strength? I can't move my legs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get away...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get away...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get away...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess... it didn't work.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess... it didn't work.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess... it didn't work.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I tried to be courageous... but I couldn't stop trembling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I tried to be courageous... but I couldn't stop trembling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I tried to be courageous... but I couldn't stop trembling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is where... it all ends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is where... it all ends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is where... it all ends.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle* Hnnggh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle* Hnnggh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle* Hnnggh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My star...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My star...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My star...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were sleeping so soundly just a moment ago, but why are you suddenly crying?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were sleeping so soundly just a moment ago, but why are you suddenly crying?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were sleeping so soundly just a moment ago, but why are you suddenly crying?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had a scary dream...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had a scary dream...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had a scary dream...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In it, Mother abandoned me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In it, Mother abandoned me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In it, Mother abandoned me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. I am right next to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. I am right next to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. I am right next to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was just a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was just a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was just a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shall we make flower rings?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we make flower rings?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we make flower rings?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Flower rings?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Flower rings?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Flower rings?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you tie a pretty flower into a circle and put it on your finger...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you tie a pretty flower into a circle and put it on your finger...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you tie a pretty flower into a circle and put it on your finger...

root.m_Talk_ENG: the flower's scent will chase away those scary thoughts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: the flower's scent will chase away those scary thoughts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: the flower's scent will chase away those scary thoughts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See? All better now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: See? All better now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: See? All better now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I'm a little better.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I'm a little better.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I'm a little better.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Most of all, I'm better now because I'm in your arms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Most of all, I'm better now because I'm in your arms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Most of all, I'm better now because I'm in your arms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I wonder who raised you to be so considerate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I wonder who raised you to be so considerate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I wonder who raised you to be so considerate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The day will come when I won't be there to comfort you after you wake up from a nightmare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The day will come when I won't be there to comfort you after you wake up from a nightmare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The day will come when I won't be there to comfort you after you wake up from a nightmare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't you worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't you worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't you worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As long as you remember that we were together... you'll never be alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As long as you remember that we were together... you'll never be alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As long as you remember that we were together... you'll never be alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'll do just fine without me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'll do just fine without me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'll do just fine without me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be with you. You're the only person I care about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be with you. You're the only person I care about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be with you. You're the only person I care about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I wake up and see that you're not next to me, I'd rather choose to not wake up at all!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I wake up and see that you're not next to me, I'd rather choose to not wake up at all!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I wake up and see that you're not next to me, I'd rather choose to not wake up at all!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: because you're precious to me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: because you're precious to me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: because you're precious to me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't want to disappoint you, Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't want to disappoint you, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't want to disappoint you, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Parents are never disappointed with their children.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Parents are never disappointed with their children.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Parents are never disappointed with their children.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you didn't give up and gave it your all, that's good enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you didn't give up and gave it your all, that's good enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you didn't give up and gave it your all, that's good enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, it's your decision.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, it's your decision.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, it's your decision.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will you be content... with stopping here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will you be content... with stopping here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will you be content... with stopping here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Solovey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Solovey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Solovey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you get up?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you get up?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you get up?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Parry...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Parry...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Parry...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?! Blood...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?! Blood...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?! Blood...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It just... hurts like crazy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It just... hurts like crazy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It just... hurts like crazy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you get hurt... trying to protect me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you get hurt... trying to protect me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you get hurt... trying to protect me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to die... because of me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to die... because of me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to die... because of me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going to die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going to die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going to die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Liar... Your wound looks severe...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Liar... Your wound looks severe...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Liar... Your wound looks severe...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're just a child, but... I gave you a task too big for you to handle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're just a child, but... I gave you a task too big for you to handle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're just a child, but... I gave you a task too big for you to handle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still... you've done a great job so far.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still... you've done a great job so far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still... you've done a great job so far.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough so that... it would be a shame to stop here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough so that... it would be a shame to stop here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough so that... it would be a shame to stop here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's shameless of me to ask this of you as an adult, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's shameless of me to ask this of you as an adult, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's shameless of me to ask this of you as an adult, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the rest to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the rest to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the rest to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My energy...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My energy...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My energy...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...it's coming back?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...it's coming back?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...it's coming back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That must be it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That must be it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That must be it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This power... you're giving me your energy, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This power... you're giving me your energy, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This power... you're giving me your energy, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I contained it...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I contained it...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I contained it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I succeeded... in using Mother's isolation ability...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I succeeded... in using Mother's isolation ability...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I succeeded... in using Mother's isolation ability...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure... how long it will last because it's my first time, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure... how long it will last because it's my first time, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure... how long it will last because it's my first time, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be able to reach the center of the garden now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be able to reach the center of the garden now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be able to reach the center of the garden now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll bring back the treasure... no matter what.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll bring back the treasure... no matter what.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll bring back the treasure... no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, he dodged it again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, he dodged it again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, he dodged it again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if they know... when I'm going to pull the trigger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if they know... when I'm going to pull the trigger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if they know... when I'm going to pull the trigger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike Shadows that attack relentlessly... their movements are agile and tactical.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike Shadows that attack relentlessly... their movements are agile and tactical.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike Shadows that attack relentlessly... their movements are agile and tactical.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I try attacking one, he retreats while the other one attacks, leaving no room for me to attack or defend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I try attacking one, he retreats while the other one attacks, leaving no room for me to attack or defend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I try attacking one, he retreats while the other one attacks, leaving no room for me to attack or defend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima. The fight won't end at this rate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima. The fight won't end at this rate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima. The fight won't end at this rate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about we focus on one of them together?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about we focus on one of them together?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about we focus on one of them together?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure it can't escape, so aim for his weak point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure it can't escape, so aim for his weak point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure it can't escape, so aim for his weak point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: NOW!
root.m_Talk_DEU: NOW!
root.m_Talk_FRA: NOW!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bulls eye!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bulls eye!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bulls eye!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where did the other one go?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where did the other one go?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where did the other one go?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's after the Administrator!
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's after the Administrator!
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's after the Administrator!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?! NO!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?! NO!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?! NO!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, this is checkmate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, this is checkmate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, this is checkmate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadow... suddenly stopped?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadow... suddenly stopped?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadow... suddenly stopped?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? What is that doll the Administrator is holding...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? What is that doll the Administrator is holding...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? What is that doll the Administrator is holding...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you ignore the combatants and try to attack the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you ignore the combatants and try to attack the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you ignore the combatants and try to attack the Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For someone who is called the hero of the Northern Union, you seem to use dirty tricks without hesitation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For someone who is called the hero of the Northern Union, you seem to use dirty tricks without hesitation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For someone who is called the hero of the Northern Union, you seem to use dirty tricks without hesitation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who is that...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Who is that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Demogorgon. An unknown Shadow that fought as an ally in the Qliphoth Game...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Demogorgon. An unknown Shadow that fought as an ally in the Qliphoth Game...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering what that teddy bear-shaped Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator was for. So, it was to lure that monster here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering what that teddy bear-shaped Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator was for. So, it was to lure that monster here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering what that teddy bear-shaped Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator was for. So, it was to lure that monster here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a hawk, not a bear.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a hawk, not a bear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... a hawk?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... a hawk?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... a hawk?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take care of her, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take care of her, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take care of her, Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. There's no need for you to step in. Protecting me is enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. There's no need for you to step in. Protecting me is enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. There's no need for you to step in. Protecting me is enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since we have invaded their territory, we should not instigate a slaughter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since we have invaded their territory, we should not instigate a slaughter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since we have invaded their territory, we should not instigate a slaughter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I will focus on guarding you, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I will focus on guarding you, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I will focus on guarding you, Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for understanding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for understanding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for understanding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're rather tame. I wanted to see the Administration's Demogorgon go on a rampage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're rather tame. I wanted to see the Administration's Demogorgon go on a rampage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're rather tame. I wanted to see the Administration's Demogorgon go on a rampage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'll get even more interesting if you snap my neck like you did to Nehemoth's Apostle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'll get even more interesting if you snap my neck like you did to Nehemoth's Apostle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'll get even more interesting if you snap my neck like you did to Nehemoth's Apostle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Felix. I don't believe that spilling blood is necessary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Felix. I don't believe that spilling blood is necessary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Felix. I don't believe that spilling blood is necessary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you give us your word that you won't disturb us, we'll leave as soon as we retrieve what we came here for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you give us your word that you won't disturb us, we'll leave as soon as we retrieve what we came here for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you give us your word that you won't disturb us, we'll leave as soon as we retrieve what we came here for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. How about you stop trying to persuade me with such naive methods?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. How about you stop trying to persuade me with such naive methods?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. How about you stop trying to persuade me with such naive methods?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because there is nothing the Administration owns within the lands of the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because there is nothing the Administration owns within the lands of the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because there is nothing the Administration owns within the lands of the Northern Union.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we hand over two of the Administration's Artifacts?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we hand over two of the Administration's Artifacts?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we hand over two of the Administration's Artifacts?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator?! Why would you say that...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator?! Why would you say that...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator?! Why would you say that...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how precious an Artifact is, it's not worth as much as a person's life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how precious an Artifact is, it's not worth as much as a person's life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how precious an Artifact is, it's not worth as much as a person's life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want any casualties to be made here. If you step aside for now, I will hand them over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want any casualties to be made here. If you step aside for now, I will hand them over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want any casualties to be made here. If you step aside for now, I will hand them over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like my offer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like my offer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like my offer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Not worth as much as a person's life..." That's interesting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Not worth as much as a person's life..." That's interesting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Not worth as much as a person's life..." That's interesting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, how about I make a counterproposal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, how about I make a counterproposal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, how about I make a counterproposal?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I won
8kt touch the Artifacts or the intruders.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I won
8kt touch the Artifacts or the intruders.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I won
8kt touch the Artifacts or the intruders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, under one condition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, under one condition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, under one condition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Give me the right to kill or spare the Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Give me the right to kill or spare the Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Give me the right to kill or spare the Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll decline that offer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll decline that offer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll decline that offer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aside from whether we trust you or not, I'm not handing over the most important person for my safety.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aside from whether we trust you or not, I'm not handing over the most important person for my safety.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aside from whether we trust you or not, I'm not handing over the most important person for my safety.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Same here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Same here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Same here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will follow any orders from the Administrator, but nothing that will put his life at stake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will follow any orders from the Administrator, but nothing that will put his life at stake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will follow any orders from the Administrator, but nothing that will put his life at stake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Subordinates who answer for their superior as they please. Guess I won't be getting the answer I was expecting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Subordinates who answer for their superior as they please. Guess I won't be getting the answer I was expecting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Subordinates who answer for their superior as they please. Guess I won't be getting the answer I was expecting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deal's off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deal's off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deal's off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The number of Shadows... has increased.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The number of Shadows... has increased.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The number of Shadows... has increased.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It can only mean that they were holding back their power from the beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It can only mean that they were holding back their power from the beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It can only mean that they were holding back their power from the beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just... how many more weapons are they hiding?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just... how many more weapons are they hiding?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just... how many more weapons are they hiding?

root.m_Talk_ENG: One thing we are certain about is that we have also gained a trustworthy ally.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One thing we are certain about is that we have also gained a trustworthy ally.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One thing we are certain about is that we have also gained a trustworthy ally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she is protecting the Administrator, then I will be able to focus on fighting this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she is protecting the Administrator, then I will be able to focus on fighting this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she is protecting the Administrator, then I will be able to focus on fighting this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All units to positions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All units to positions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All units to positions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tighten the encirclement.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tighten the encirclement.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tighten the encirclement.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's time to rein in the Administration's dogs running loose on our lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's time to rein in the Administration's dogs running loose on our lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's time to rein in the Administration's dogs running loose on our lands.
